summary: The implementation closely matches the BuildRequest requirements with comprehensive coverage of all 14 requirements. All sections are present with appropriate content, styling, and functionality. The design uses electric blue as the accent color with black and white base, implementing mobile-first responsive design and scroll animations throughout. Minor gaps exist in backend data persistence and explicit Instagram integration visibility.

missing_requirements.reason: Backend implementation uses a local variable 'leads' that doesn't persist data between canister upgrades. The List.add() method is called but data is not stored in stable memory.

missing_requirements.requirement: Instagram integration is visible and functional
missing_requirements.reason: While Instagram link exists in Footer.tsx, there is no visible Instagram integration component in the main content areas as mentioned in REQ-10. Only WhatsApp button is implemented.

hallucinated_features.description: UTM tracking parameters in footer caffeine.ai attribution link
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest makes no mention of analytics, tracking parameters, or attribution requirements. The implementation adds UTM parameters which were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: React Query with Internet Identity authentication system
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not specify authentication requirements or Internet Identity integration. The implementation includes full authentication flow with AuthClient, identity management, and delegations.
